reapack.name: cueport_sync.lua
reapack.desc: CuePort Sync — Artist comments as markers

metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\deflang1033 {\fonttbl{\f0\fswiss\fcharset0 Helvetica;}} {\colortbl;\red230\green230\blue230;\red176\green136\blue224;\red150\green150\blue155;} \f0\fs22\cf1 \fs28\b\cf2 CuePort Sync\b0\fs22\cf1\par \par Reaper integration for \cf2 CuePort\cf1 . Pulls top-level artist comments for the active version of a production and places them as project markers with an on-hover tooltip showing the full text.\par \par \b Features\b0\par - Device-code pairing with the CuePort studio portal\par - Production picker grouped by artist with inline search\par - Project markers with uniform color + hidden ID encoding\par - Hover tooltip shows the full comment text\par - Floating pill + popup menu for one-click sync\par - Per-project binding stored in the .rpp\par \par \b Requirements\b0\par - Reaper 6.68 or later\par - \b ReaImGui\b0 (install via ReaPack, required)\par - \b curl\b0 (bundled with Win 10+/macOS/Linux)\par - \b SWS Extension\b0 (recommended, for reliable hover detection)\par - \b JS_ReaScriptAPI\b0 (recommended)\par \par \b Setup\b0\par 1. Install this package via ReaPack.\par 2. Open the Reaper Actions list and run \b cueport_sync.lua\b0 .\par 3. Click \b Connect to CuePort\b0 and approve in the browser.\par 4. Pick a production and bind it to the open .rpp.\par 5. Click \b Sync comments\b0 . Done.\par \par \b Time alignment\b0\par Comments are placed relative to the start of the rendered audio. If your mix does not begin at 0:00 on the Reaper timeline, right-click the ruler, choose \b Change start time/measure \f8594 Set 0:00 to current edit cursor\b0 with the cursor at the render start, then press \b Sync comments\b0 again. Markers will line up.\par }

version.author: CuePort
version.changelog: v2.5.3 — Sign fix for the project time offset. Markers now land at the correct ruler position when "Set render start" has been used. v2.5.2 — Use Reaper action 43345 to set the time offset (reliable on every Reaper version; GetProjectStateChunk missing on some builds). v2.5.1 — Render-start button now writes PROJOFFS directly (no SWS needed, but broken on builds that lack GetProjectStateChunk — see v2.5.2). v2.5.0 — One-click "Set render start at cursor" button + visible render-start marker. Auto re-sync after the offset changes. v2.4.0 — Respect Reaper project start offset. Set "0:00 to current edit cursor" at the render start, re-sync, and markers land on the right ruler time. v2.3.2 — Floating menu as separate persistent window (toggle + stays open). v2.0.0 — Major UI rework: English UI, CuePort theme, logo, non-dockable. v1.3.0 — Switched to project markers (replaced items-on-track approach). v1.2.0 — Hover tooltip over markers. v1.0.0 — Initial release.
